query: SELECT id, title, SUBSTRING(legalBasis, 1, 500) as legalBasis_preview FROM special_cases WHERE legalBasis LIKE '%wolters%' OR legalBasis LIKE '%Wolters%' OR legalBasis LIKE '%wk.%' OR legalBasis LIKE '%kluwer%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qC6e8XA9uYDpdWY.4aab5d30693d --database DirVLPm6UeFJi3utFGbgZe --execute SELECT id, title, SUBSTRING(legalBasis, 1, 500) as legalBasis_preview FROM special_cases WHERE legalBasis LIKE '%wolters%' OR legalBasis LIKE '%Wolters%' OR legalBasis LIKE '%wk.%' OR legalBasis LIKE '%kluwer%' LIMIT 10;
